title: AddressAdded
description: Emitted when a new address is added to a person in the partner domain.

eventId.description: Unique identifier for this event instance.

personId.description: Unique identifier of the person aggregate.

street.description: Street name (may be encrypted when encrypted=true).

houseNumber.description: House number (may be encrypted when encrypted=true).

postalCode.description: Postal code (may be encrypted when encrypted=true).

city.description: City name (may be encrypted when encrypted=true).

validFrom.description: Start date of address validity in ISO-8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

validTo.description: End date of address validity in ISO-8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD), or null if open-ended.

encrypted.description: When true, PII fields (street, houseNumber, postalCode, city, land) are Vault-encrypted per ADR-009.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the event was produced.
